narrative:
Harris 3 (Woodmore) (precinct in Ottawa County) has 641 registered voters, with 49.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.8%, a modest Republican lean of 5.5 percentage points.
